description: Content Intelligence System — audits MPLite DB, pulls all Blotato social account data, indexes local video files, deduplicates against uploaded posts, runs cross-platform analysis, and uploads everything to Supabase for informed content decisions

features.name: MPLite DB audit — fetch publish_queue, daily_counters, platforms, activity_log; upsert into ci_posts
Blotato account sync — enumerate accounts, paginate last 90 days of posts, upsert metrics into ci_posts
Local file scanner — recursive scan LOCAL_VIDEO_DIRS, SHA256 hash, upsert ci_local_files, match against ci_posts
Safe-delete engine — dry-run report of deletable files; --confirm-delete flag for actual deletion
Cross-platform analyzer — top performers, platform breakdown, content gaps, recommendations; upsert ci_analysis_snapshots
Content association graph — group posts by filename stem across platforms, store in snapshot
Supabase schema migration — create ci_posts, ci_local_files, ci_analysis_snapshots tables on first launch
CLI status dashboard — node index.js status prints latest snapshot: posts by platform, indexed files, safe-to-delete bytes, top 5 recommendations
Unit + integration tests — mock Blotato/MPLite APIs, test hash matching, dry-run dedup, analyzer recommendations, full pipeline
